effort_complexity.rationale: Six call sites across four MCP files, same fix pattern; tools_plan.go's write-back path needs the most care.

violations: Gate 6 / AC-02: internal/mcp/context.go AssembleSliceContext still extracts violations by regex-scraping proof.md via extractViolations; it does not read proof.json.not_delivered as required by spec.json AC-02.

Gate 2 & Gate 6 / AC-05: internal/mcp/tools_test.go, internal/mcp/lint_test.go, and internal/mcp/catalog_test.go still hand-write legacy 'tracks:' YAML fixtures in index.md and were not changed to build fixtures via the real sworn render path / board.json as required by spec.json AC-05.

reachability_artifacts: internal/mcp tests: TestGetBoard, TestGetBlockedExtractsViolations, TestGetSliceContext, TestDeferSliceWritesRuleTwo, TestRerunSliceWritesPID, TestPatchSliceWritesInstructions, TestApproveMergeRejectsUnverified, TestListReleases, TestSetTrackUpdates, TestSetTrackColon (drives the same code paths an MCP client reaches over the wire)
